body:
## What's Changed
* feat: show progress bar when analysing the whole disk/partition by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/523
* feat: print marked items to stdout by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/528
* feat: add support for browsing tar archives by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/513
* feat: force interactive mode by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/533
* fix: create parent dir for sqlite db by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/511
* fix: use smaller value log file size for 32bit systems by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/519
* fix: make itemCount 64bit by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/520
* ci: use Golang 1.26 by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/508
* ci: drop support for golang 1.24 by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/521
* ci: release gh action by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/527
* test: move coverage for app package by @dundee in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/534
* chore(deps): bump modernc.org/sqlite from 1.46.1 to 1.47.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/515
* chore(deps): bump github.com/fatih/color from 1.18.0 to 1.19.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/524
* chore(deps): bump codecov/codecov-action from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/529
* chore(deps): bump modernc.org/sqlite from 1.47.0 to 1.48.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/dundee/gdu/pull/531

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dundee/gdu/compare/v5.34.0...v5.35.0
name: v5.35.0
